title: Current role and what I am improving
summary: A snapshot of my current career status, recent learning progress, and skills I am building next.
content: At the moment I am focusing on consistent delivery and cleaner communication in daily work. I want my updates to be practical and clear so that progress is easy to measure.
One improvement area is prioritization: I am learning to focus on the highest-impact tasks first and reduce context switching.
In the next updates, I will track what changed, what worked, and what I would do differently.
